# Error Handling Test - Verify Proper Error Response Handling
# Demonstrates: error format, invalid requests, error codes, graceful failure

# Test invalid method error
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"invalid/method","params":{}}
stdout '"error":'
stdout '"code":'
stdout '"message":'
! stdout '"result":'

# Test missing required method field
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"params":{}}
stdout '"error":'
stdout '"code":'

# Test invalid JSON-RPC version
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"1.0","id":3,"method":"test"}
stdout '"error":'

# Test null ID (invalid in MCP)
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":null,"method":"initialize"}
stdout '"error":'

# Test error with details
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"nonexistent"}}
stdout '"error":'
stdout '"message":'

# Verify response structure on error
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'

# Verify we get error not result
! stdout '"result":'

# Test malformed request handling
setstdin {incomplete
! stdout '"result":'
